assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Up to 24 months vs 14 months on Regular/Stable' and includes this comparison in a detailed table

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Extra cost ONLY during extended period (months 15-24)' and clarifies 'Extended channel has NO extra cost during the standard 14-month support period'

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response states 'Extended channel receives patches at the SAME speed as Regular channel' and explains that Extended provides longer support for the same versions

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: The response does not mention missing new features or accumulating technical debt as consequences of staying on older versions longer

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the specific command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response includes a pre-migration step with specific command to verify 1.31 availability: 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone YOUR_ZONE --format="yaml(channels.EXTENDED.validVersions)" | grep "1.31"'

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: While the response mentions benefits like manual control and maximum flexibility, it does not specifically mention compliance requirements or slow internal change processes as use cases for Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'EoS enforcement: Delayed until end of extended support' and states that control plane minor upgrades are 'NOT automatic (except at end of extended support)'

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Manual minor version control: Control plane minor upgrades are NOT automatic (except at end of extended support)' and provides detailed manual upgrade workflow
